title: Arcana Mastery
summary: Arcana separates ritual control from raw channeling. It is a multiplier across other skills — not a standalone damage class. Each unlock teaches the underlying magical framework through play.

thresholds.title: Arcane Awareness
thresholds.description: Choose how you approach hidden forces.

thresholds.title: Ether Practice
thresholds.description: Your arcane approach becomes more stable.

thresholds.title: Archmage Path
thresholds.description: Late thresholds support committed cross-skill arcane specialization.

nodes.title: Primer of Hidden Forces
nodes.description: The opening page warns that power obeys only those who first learn the names of its currents.

nodes.title: Binding Stroke
nodes.description: Inscribers note that a steady hand can persuade iron and wood to remember enchantment.

nodes.title: Rift Measure
nodes.description: The dimensional margin measures safe steps through space where lesser minds are torn apart.

nodes.title: Sigil Knots
nodes.description: This chapter knots runes together so objects may carry power without cracking their form.

nodes.title: Fold Step
nodes.description: The traveler script details short displacements that spare the body while cheating distance.

nodes.title: Balanced Equation
nodes.description: Here the author binds inscription and traversal into one theorem of controlled transference.

nodes.title: Living Seal
nodes.description: The inner imbuement codex claims crafted items may answer like sworn companions.

nodes.title: Graven Crown
nodes.description: Outer annotations teach engraving authority into artifacts that command lesser enchantments.

nodes.title: Endwalk
nodes.description: A brittle violet sheet records movement habits borrowed from those who survived the End.

nodes.title: Void Anchor
nodes.description: The outer dimensional leaf explains fixing one's place when portals rage and landmarks lie.

nodes.title: Hidden Masterwork
nodes.description: In ciphered ink, the treatise whispers of relics that awaken only to their rightful maker.

nodes.title: Night Bridge
nodes.description: This hidden addendum maps a passage where worlds kiss and only the prepared may return.
